4:00 pm show-Roast Battle League LIVE in the Village Underground

Roast Battle League The Roast Battle League comes to The Comedy Cellar for the first time. Comics from all over the globe will go head-to-head with four battles lined up, nothing is off-limits, and no ego is safe. Come see the first sport that’s also a comedy show live in the Mecca of ball busting and trash talking. Let’s Roast!

Brian Moses CREATOR AND HOST OF "ROAST BATTLE"

6:00 pm show-Braver Angels Presents: Are there things we shouldn't joke about?

Braver Angels Launched in 2016, Braver Angels is a bipartisan citizen’s movement to unify our divided nation. By bringing Red and Blue Americans together into a working alliance, we’re building new ways to talk to one another, participate together in public life, and influence the direction of the nation.
